name: Caramel Crunch Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kahlua liqueur (or 1/2 cup cold coffee)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13x9 inch pan.
3. In a large saucepan, melt margarine and chocolate. Add water and bring to a boil.
4. Stir in oats, sugar, brown sugar, chocolate syrup, liqueur (or coffee), and vanilla. Mix well.
5. Add eggs; mix thoroughly.
6. Stir flour, baking soda, and salt into the chocolate mixture, mixing well.
7. Pour batter into the greased pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched lightly in the center.
9. Remove cake from oven immediately.
10. In a small saucepan, combine all topping ingredients.
11. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
12. Reduce heat and simmer for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
13. Pour topping over the hot cake.
14. Broil 4-6 inches from the heat source for about 2 minutes or until the topping is bubbly and lightly browned.
